title: make list of beads tasks for open/close DeepBook Predict positions
description: users want to use risk-react-web app to open (mint) and close (redeem) deep book predict positions for BTC/DUSDC pair. Split this feature implementation into tasks, interview human of all gaps in requiremnets or implementation in as many iterations as required to cover all cases including edge cases. Each task must have user stories as acceptance criteria

title: Fix LP flow local-day aggregation
description: LP flow groups by UTC date but labels by local date, which can render duplicate local days with split totals. Update chart bucketing so the grouping key and displayed label use the same calendar day.
close_reason: Fixed LP flow grouping to use local-day keys matching displayed labels

title: Correct PLP decimal display scale
description: Update risk-react-web so PLP parsing and formatting uses 6 decimals instead of 9, matching the corrected token scale.
close_reason: Corrected PLP token decimals to 6 and verified build

title: on /vaults/activity page supply and withdrawal amounts are x1000 times smaler that they should, remember DUSDC has 10^6 decimal points not 10^9
close_reason: Fixed DUSDC activity amount formatting to use 6 quote decimals

title: Fix /vaults displays the same page as /vautls/activity. When done check if you need to update risk-trading-8mw beads task/issue
close_reason: Fixed by making /vaults/activity a non-nested route; verified /vaults renders Vault Actions and /vaults/activity renders Liquidity Pool Activity.

title: move "vault activity" table from /vaults/activity page to /vaults page right under "LP Flow" card; remove /vault/activity page
close_reason: Moved vault activity into /vaults and removed dedicated activity route

title: Fix LP flow chart outlier scaling
description: LP flow bars become unreadable when one supply or withdrawal bucket is orders of magnitude larger than the rest. Add a scale mode that preserves raw tooltip values while making normal buckets visible.
close_reason: Implemented symmetric log scaling, linear toggle, raw tooltips, and outlier markers for LP flow chart.

title: Audit DUSDC display formatting in risk web
description: Check DUSDC/USD display call sites in apps/risk-react-web, confirm base-unit scaling for position amounts, and centralize token formatting helpers where appropriate.
close_reason: Completed DUSDC/base-unit formatting audit and fixes in risk-react-web

title: check if 'LP Flow' chart converts DUSDC to base points, DUSDC uses 10^6 decimal points so 1000000000 of DUSDC should be formated as
close_reason: Fixed LP Flow chart to convert DUSDC base units with 6 quote decimals

title: add inflow/outflow bar chart for lp (vault) supplies and withdrawals on @apps/risk-react-web/src/routes/vaults.tsx
close_reason: Added LP inflow/outflow chart to vaults page

title: Show oracle quote formula
description: Add a compact formula note under the oracle quote preview explaining estimated cost and redeem payout calculations from get_trade_amounts.
close_reason: Added compact formula note under the DUSDC amount note in the oracle quote preview.

title: Add quantity stepper to oracle quote preview
description: Add minus and plus controls beside the oracle quote preview quantity input so users can adjust quantity without typing.
close_reason: Added plus and minus icon buttons to adjust quote preview quantity by 1 with a zero floor.

title: Filter oracle quote strikes by direction
description: Filter the oracle quote preview strike buttons so UP shows strikes above spot and DOWN shows strikes below spot, while keeping a nearest-strike fallback if the sampled rows do not contain an actionable side.
close_reason: Filtered quote preview strikes by UP/DOWN side relative to spot with nearest-strike fallback.

title: Add oracle strike quote preview
description: Add a strike selection UI to oracle detail pages that previews estimated DUSDC mint/redeem amounts from predict::get_trade_amounts for a user-entered quantity.
close_reason: Implemented oracle strike quote preview with quantity, direction switch, and DUSDC mint/redeem preview.

title: Build read-only SVI oracle dashboard
description: Add a first version of a DeepBook Predict oracle page by URL param that fetches oracle state, computes local SVI fair UP/DN probabilities, and displays decision charts/tables for read-only position evaluation.
close_reason: Implemented first read-only SVI oracle dashboard

title: Add DeepBook Predict vault liquidity actions
description: Add user-facing supply and withdraw flows for DeepBook Predict vault liquidity. Current app is read-only and only shows oracle, position, and LP activity from predict-server testnet endpoints. Missing pieces: Sui wallet connection, Sui client/network config, package/object/coin type constants, onchain Predict and vault reads, quote coin and PLP balance discovery, transaction builders for predict::supply and predict::withdraw, form validation, previews for vault value/shares/withdrawable amount, transaction signing/execution, post-transaction refresh, error states, and tests/build verification. Docs: https://docs.sui.io/onchain-finance/deepbook-predict/contract-information/predict
acceptance_criteria: Users can connect a Sui wallet on the configured network; users can see accepted quote asset balance, PLP balance, vault value, and currently withdrawable amount; users can submit a supply transaction that deposits quote asset and receives PLP; users can submit a withdraw transaction that burns PLP and receives quote asset; invalid or unavailable amounts are blocked before signing; successful transactions link to explorer and refresh balances/activity; build passes.
close_reason: Implemented DeepBook Predict vault liquidity supply/withdraw UI, Sui wallet/client providers, onchain vault and wallet balance reads, transaction builders, validation, explorer links, route navigation, dApp Kit CSS, and build verification. Live funded-wallet transaction testing split to risk-trading-0m9.

title: Trim trailing zeros in amount formatting
description: Update money and decimal amount display so insignificant trailing decimal zeroes are omitted while preserving meaningful fractional digits.
close_reason: Completed

title: Add liquidity pool activity route
description: Create a /vaults/activity page that fetches LP supplies and withdrawals, merges and sorts them by checkpoint, and displays the activity table in navigation.
close_reason: Implemented /vaults/activity route with merged LP supply and withdrawal table

title: Add sidebar navigation to risk React web
description: Add shadcn sidebar navigation for the existing app routes and verify the app still builds.
close_reason: Added sidebar navigation with working active state and verified build.

title: Add positions route
description: Add /positions page with opened and closed tabs backed by predict-server minted and redeemed position endpoints.
close_reason: Implemented /positions route with opened and closed position tables.

title: Switch shadcn components to Radix UI
description: Migrate shadcn setup and existing UI primitives from Base UI to Radix UI.
close_reason: Implemented Radix UI shadcn migration for tabs.

title: Pin risk-react-web latest package versions
description: Replace latest dependency specifiers in apps/risk-react-web/package.json with the versions already resolved in pnpm-lock.yaml, and keep lockfile specifiers aligned.
close_reason: Pinned latest dependency specifiers to installed lockfile versions.

title: Add Oracle States table state tabs
description: Add active/settled tab filtering to the Oracle States table on the risk React web index route, preserving existing query params and defaulting invalid state params to active.
close_reason: Implemented Oracle States active/settled tab filter

title: Add oracles state table
description: Add a shadcn table to apps/risk-react-web/src/routes/index.tsx that displays oracle state data from the Mysten predict-server oracles endpoint.
close_reason: Implemented oracle states table and verified production build

title: Manually test Predict vault liquidity with funded testnet wallet
description: Run an end-to-end browser test of the /vaults page using a funded Sui testnet wallet that owns DUSDC. Verify wallet connect, supply signing/execution, PLP balance refresh, withdraw signing/execution, quote balance refresh, and explorer transaction links. This follows the implemented DeepBook Predict vault liquidity UI in risk-trading-yvk.
acceptance_criteria: A funded testnet wallet can supply DUSDC to the Predict vault and receive PLP; the same wallet can withdraw by burning PLP and receive DUSDC; balances and explorer links update after each transaction.
